evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: The intelligence layer for data engineering AI — 100+ deterministic tools for SQL analysis, column-level lineage, dbt, FinOps, and warehouse connectivity across every major cloud platform.

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: Run standalone in your terminal, embed underneath Claude Code or Codex, or integrate into CI pipelines and orchestration DAGs. Precision data tooling for any LLM.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: **Step 1: Configure your LLM provider** (required before anything works): ```bash altimate # Launch the TUI /connect # Interactive setup — choose your provider and enter your API key ```

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: Or set an environment variable directly: ```bash export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=your_key # Anthropic Claude export OPENAI_API_KEY=your_key # OpenAI ```

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: **Step 2 (optional): Auto-detect your data stack** (read-only, safe for production connections): ```bash altimate /discover ```

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: `/discover` auto-detects dbt projects, warehouse connections (from `~/.dbt/profiles.yml`, Docker, environment variables), and installed tools (dbt, sqlfluff, airflow, dagster, and more). Skip this and start building — you can always run it later.

evidence.title: v0.5.2
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed ### Features ### Bug Fixes - fix: address multi-model code review findings for recent merges (#307) (04a807e7c) - fix: suppress Snowflake SDK stdout log noise in TUI (#305) (b1e6520bf) - fix: invert `WebFetch` User-Agent strategy to honest-bot-first (#303) (76ec9fe56) - fix: add trace history dialog and /traces command for TUI (#297) (bb940137b) - fix: disable snowflake sdk console logs in TUI (fixes #300) (#301) (1aab9317e) ### Other Changes - release: v0.5.2 (4cee25fe7) - chore:remove brew from docs and readme (#299) (b25f49ec1) - Fix typo in README for altimate to altimate-code (#293) (157847052) - docs: add showcase examples with screenshots for examples page (#292) (ba6631ae0) ### Install ```bash npm install -g @altimateai/altimate-code@0.5.2 # or brew install AltimateAI/tap/altimate-code ``` **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AltimateAI/altimate-code/compare/v0.5.1...v0.5.2

evidence.title: v0.5.1
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed ### Features - feat: add core_failure telemetry with PII-safe input signatures (#245) (9aa1d399c) - feat: simplify to 3 modes (builder/analyst/plan) + SQL write access control (#282) (93eefed2f) ### Bug Fixes - fix: use npm install in driver error messages, add peerDependencies to published packages (#273) (53c38a8c5) - fix: replace escapeSqlString with parameterized query binds in finops/schema (#277) (b90794307) - fix: trace system prompt only once per session to avoid duplication (#287) (0da1482bd) ### Other Changes - release: v0.5.1 (b5242faf9) - Fix/docs readme final (#288) (872880bbe) - docs: sync missing content from v2 and rename What's New to Changelog (#284) (79ae42815) ### Install ```bash npm install -g @altimateai/altimate-code@0.5.1 # or brew install AltimateAI/tap/altimate-code ``` **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AltimateAI/altimate-code/compare/v0.5.0...v0.5.1

evidence.title: v0.5.0
evidence.excerpt: ## What's Changed ### Features - feat: smooth streaming mode for TUI response rendering (#281) (69bd0d667) - feat: ship builtin skills to customers via postinstall (#279) (bf5541c55) - feat: add `/configure-claude` and `/configure-codex` built-in commands (#235) (eed2dc09f) ### Bug Fixes - fix: brew formula stuck at v0.3.1, version normalization in publish pipeline (#286) (77aad8346) - fix: harden auth field handling for all warehouse drivers (#271) (f27dc39e1) - fix: suppress console logging that corrupts TUI display (#269) (0612f4ece) ### Other Changes - release: v0.5.0 (6e7a1fcda) ### Install ```bash npm install -g @altimateai/altimate-code@0.5.0 # or brew install AltimateAI/tap/altimate-code ``` **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AltimateAI/altimate-code/compare/v0.4.9...v0.5.0
